title: Ransomware Incident - srv-web01.irorg.logical - 24 February 2026
description: Multiple high-severity SIEM alerts indicated a ransomware attack within the irorg domain environment on 24th of February 2026. Suspicious executables and PowerShell activity were detected on ws-user03 and ws-user04 hosts. Admin credentials were used to access dc01.irorg.local and ransomware deployed on srv-web01.irorg.local. Backup infrastructure may also be compromised.
tasks:

ID: ~40988920
Author: responder4@irorg.com
Date: 24/02/2026 14:56
Type: case_task_log
Message: SOC detected multiple high-severity alerts indicating malicious activity. Alerts include suspicious executables in Temp directories, encoded PowerShell commands, outbound connections to suspicious domains and unusual authentication activity. Shortly after alerts began, users reported encrypted files with .df_locked extension on srv-web01.irorg.local.

Author: responder4@irorg.com
Date: 24/02/2026 15:09
Type: case_task_log
Message: Attack timeline

9:12 Dropper binary executed on user workstation (ws-user03)
9:13 Connection attempt to suspected C2 domain (servicewikii.com)
9:13 Suspicious PowerShell script executed from user workstation
9:16 Secondary loader / Beacon module executed (ws-user04)
9:17 Outbound traffic to external beacon server
9:18 Windows event log cleared 
9:21 Suspicious admin login originating from workstation (dc01.irorg.local)
9:24 Outbound connection to suspected C2 / Beacon Server
9:26 Encryption module executed and initiated (host=srv-web01.irorg.local)
9:31 Outbound connection from backup server to external host


--- LOG ENTRY ---
ID: ~28712
Author: responder4@irorg.com
Date: 24/02/2026 15:15
Type: case_task_log
Message: Summary

Investigation identified ws-user03.irorg.local as potential initial infection host via execution of update_213.exe from TEMP directory.

Lateral movement occurred to ws-user04.irorg.local and to dc01.irorg.local using admin credentials. 

df.exe was executed on the server serv-web01.irorg.local resulting in widespread file encryption.
